link.name: Github Release Modern Variant APK (File Download Link)
Github Release Legacy Variant APK (File Download Link)

releaseNote.zh-cn:
1. 修改 默认启用多重艺术家和多重流派解析（从实验性功能转正）
  2. 修改 调整部分默认设置，并重组设置分类
  3. 修改 默认创建数据库播放列表
  4. 新增 桌面小部件支持深色模式
  5. 优化 支持在夜间模式下使用另一套配色方案
  6. 优化 支持跳过流派解析与同步
  7. 优化 内部数据库同步性能
  8. 翻译 更新 巴西葡萄牙语（Ricardo）、荷兰语（Polovinci）
  9. 开发 适配 SDK API 36 (Android 16)
  10. 开发 升级 AGP 至 9.1.0
releaseNote.en:
1. Modify: Multiple artists and genres parsing is now enabled by default (graduated from experimental)
  2. Modify: change some default settings, and reorganized settings pages
  3. Modify: create database playlists by default
  4. New: add dark mode support for widgets
  5. Improve: support using another color scheme for night
  6. Improve: support skipping genres parsing and synchronization
  7. Improve: performance of internal database synchronization
  8. Translation: update Portuguese Brazilian (by Ricardo), Dutch (by Polovinci)
  9. Development: targeting SDK API 36 (Android 16)
  10. Development: upgrade AGP to 9.1.0

Github Release Legacy Variant APK (File Download Link)

releaseNote.zh-cn:
1. 改进 搜索输入防抖处理
  2. 改进 防止提取元数据失败时错误消息泛滥
  3. 开发 更新 Kotlin 至 2.3.20, 更新依赖
releaseNote.en:
1. Improve: search input debouncing for better responsiveness
  2. Improve: merging and throttling error notifications about background metadata extraction
  3. Development: upgrade Kotlin to 2.3.20, update dependencies
